host.description: Korveo API base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8000. Override here for Docker / Kubernetes / remote deployments.

project.description: Korveo project label sent as X-Korveo-Project. Defaults to 'openclaw'.

captureSystemMessage.description: Whether to capture the OpenAI-style system message text on each model.call. Default false (these payloads are usually large and rarely actionable for debugging).

maxContentChars.description: Cap on per-attribute content size in characters. Defaults to 32768. Truncated values are tagged '...(truncated)'.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for POST /v1/spans, milliseconds. Default 5000.

sharedPaths.description: Paths that bypass the per-sender storage sandbox and resolve against the shared workspace root. Glob patterns relative to workspace, or absolute. Read-only — write tools targeting these are blocked.

failClosedOnMissingWorkspace.description: When true, fs tool calls without a workspaceDir in hook context are blocked instead of silently passed through. Production should set this true.

workspaceDir.description: Override / fallback for the agent's workspace dir, used by the per-sender sandbox when OpenClaw doesn't propagate workspaceDir on tool-call hook context (observed 2026.5.x).

deniedTools.description: Tools refused outright before sandboxing. Defaults follow the active securityProfile.

securityProfile.description: One-knob shorthand. strict=healthcare/finance; standard=default; light=internal; logging-only=trace only no blocking. balanced/permissive/observability are legacy aliases.

enableTenantIsolation.description: Master switch. When false, plugin records traces but never blocks (equivalent to securityProfile=logging-only).

blockShellTools.description: Block exec/shell/bash/python and similar code-execution tools. Default: on for strict and standard profiles.

blockWebTools.description: Block web_fetch/http_get/curl and similar network-egress tools. Default: on for strict and standard profiles.

resetMemoryBetweenUsers.description: When to wipe the bot's conversation memory. between-users (default) = wipe on every sender switch. between-channels = wipe only on channel switch (same user keeps history across channels within their own scope). never = no automatic clearing (only safe with architectural per-user contexts).

hideOtherUsersData.description: When true, the AI's prompt is scrubbed of other users' names/emails/IDs/orgs before every model call. Defense-in-depth on top of memory reset.

recordSecurityEvents.description: Whether to record blocks/redactions in the dashboard's Violations table. true = every event; false = none; number 0..1 = sampled fraction.

l2HistoryResetMode.description: Technical alias for resetMemoryBetweenUsers. Use the friendly toggle instead.

l3Detectors.description: Per-detector toggles for the input redactor. Use hideOtherUsersData for the master switch unless you specifically want to disable Presidio (heavy).
